title: Docs MCP Server Starter
description: Configure which documentation sources this MCP server indexes and serves to AI assistants.

sources.title: Documentation sources
sources.description: Documentation sources to index on startup. Use a curated template ID (nextjs, tailwind, react, typescript, prisma) or provide a custom url + contentSelector for any docs site. Each source needs a unique name.

name.title: Source name
name.description: Unique label for this source (e.g., "Next.js Docs"). Used as the lookup key in MCP tool calls.

template.title: Template ID
template.description: Curated template ID: nextjs, tailwind, react, typescript, or prisma. Use this OR url + contentSelector.

url.title: Custom URL
url.description: Entry URL for a custom docs site (e.g., https://docs.example.com). Required if no template is set.

sitemapUrl.title: Sitemap URL
sitemapUrl.description: Optional explicit sitemap.xml URL. Leave blank to auto-discover from the entry URL.

contentSelector.title: Content CSS selector
contentSelector.description: CSS selector for the main content area on each page (e.g., "article", "#content", "main article"). Required for custom URLs.

maxPagesPerSource.title: Max pages per source
maxPagesPerSource.description: Cap on how many pages each source can index at startup. Lower this to speed up boot for large docs sites; raise it for fuller coverage.

cacheMaxPages.title: Cache max pages
cacheMaxPages.description: How many fetched pages to hold in the LRU cache. Cached pages return instantly and become searchable by content; uncached pages match only on title.

markdownOutput.title: Markdown output
markdownOutput.description: Convert extracted page HTML to clean markdown. Turn off to return raw text instead.
